preview.summary: Pre-tournament contenders Portugal begin Group K against a DR Congo side returning to the World Cup for the first time since 1974. Roberto Martinez's talented squad start as clear favourites, but the Leopards' Premier League-laden roster carries real threat.
preview.homeForm: Portugal topped UEFA Group F with one defeat and 20 goals, including a 9-1 win over Armenia, and rank 5th in the world.
preview.awayForm: DR Congo reached the finals via the inter-confederation playoffs and sit 46th in the FIFA rankings.
preview.homeKey: Cristiano Ronaldo, 41, chasing a first World Cup at his sixth tournament.
preview.awayKey: Yoane Wissa, Premier League forward leading the Leopards' attack.
storylines: DR Congo's first World Cup appearance since playing as Zaire in 1974
Ronaldo closes in on a historic 1,000 career goals
Every DR Congo player is a World Cup first-timer
preview.h2h: The sides have no competitive meetings, making this a first significant clash.
